channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.22 (Build 20260602.1)
item.description:
What's New

fix(injection): match Word for the web by title, not DOM class

Chrome often exposes the Word Online (WAC) editing surface as

role=Unknown with no AXDOMClassList, so the previous DOM-class match

silently failed and the diacritic-loss fix never applied for users

whose Chrome had not built its accessibility tree. Match by the

".docx" document extension in the window title instead, which is

always available regardless of Chrome's accessibility state.

  • Applied to all apps (no browser allowlist); any window whose title

contains ".docx" matches. This can include the native Word desktop

app, which is harmless (slow + one-by-one is correct, only slower).

  • Scope to .docx (Word) only; Excel/PowerPoint Online use different

editing surfaces and are not yet verified.

  • Rule stays gated by the Window Title Rules master toggle.

Also bump build to 20260602.1.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
